subject: Re: Unable to download tutorial data using Warp Tools script
body:
Hi Mark,

I think this might be an issue over at EMPIAR, when I tried to connect to
the FTP server just now I got
"Response: 421 There are too many connected users, please try later."

It worked after a retry...

Cheers,

Alister



On Fri, 14 Mar 2025 at 13:13, Mark Frank <markafrank7@gmail.com> wrote:

> Dear Warp community,
> I am trying to see what is new in Warp 2.0 and was hoping to quickly go
> through the tutorial while I process some new data in parallel.
> Unfortunately, it appears something has changed with EBI's way of storing
> the tilt series data on their website. Below is the terminal output when
> using the script provided in the Warp Tools tutorial.
> --------
>
> (warp) *➜  **WarpTools_tutorial* wget \
>
>     --timestamping \
>
>     --no-directories \
>
>     --directory-prefix ./frames \
>
>
> ftp://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/empiar/world_availability/10491/data/tiltseries/data/\*-$\{i\}_\*.tif\
> ;
>
> --2025-03-14 13:00:04--
> ftp://ftp.ebi.ac.uk/empiar/world_availability/10491/data/tiltseries/data/*-$%7Bi%7D_*.tif
> ;
>
>            => ‘./frames/.listing’
>
> Resolving ftp.ebi.ac.uk (ftp.ebi.ac.uk)... 193.62.193.165
>
> Connecting to ftp.ebi.ac.uk (ftp.ebi.ac.uk)|193.62.193.165|:21...
> connected.
>
> Logging in as anonymous ... Logged in!
>
> ==> SYST ... done.    ==> PWD ... done.
>
> ==> TYPE I ... done.  ==> CWD (1)
> /empiar/world_availability/10491/data/tiltseries/data ... done.
>
> ==> PASV ... done.    ==> LIST ... done.
>
>
> .listing                                  [  <=>
>                                         ] 148.25K   309KB/s    in 0.5s
>
>
> 2025-03-14 13:00:08 (309 KB/s) - ‘./frames/.listing’ saved [151812]
>
>
> Removed ‘./frames/.listing’.
>
> No matches on pattern ‘*-${i}_*.tif’.
>
> ------------
>
> Any help would be greatly appreciated.
>
>
> - Mark A. Frank, Ph.D.
>
> Postdoctoral Scholar
>
> Barad Lab
>
> Oregon Health and Science University
>

>
